testcase.name: PW_03_NoUppercase

failure.message: Validation message should appear for invalid password expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Validation message should appear for invalid password expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at tests.RegisterPasswordTest.executeNegative(RegisterPasswordTest.java:114) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:228) at
